title: pricing.json — Pricing Intelligence
description: Pricing model and plan breakdown per competitor (PRD §Product Information). Feeds the Pricing Matrix visualization. Joined by `entity_ref`. Each plan's price is a metricField so estimated/quote-based tiers can be represented honestly.

name.description: Tier name as published (e.g. Free, Pro, Team, Enterprise).

monthly_price.description: Per-seat or flat monthly price; metricField with `unit` (currency). Use is_estimate/range for 'contact us' tiers.

billing_period.description: e.g. monthly / annual / usage / one_time / custom.

pricing_model.description: Overall model, e.g. free / freemium / subscription / usage_based / one_time / open_source / contact_sales.

currency.description: ISO-4217 currency the published prices are in.

lowest_paid_monthly.description: Cheapest paid entry point, denormalized for the pricing matrix.
